I8SL

v1.1 source code

URL-shortener inspired by STFU.

I8SL creates short links, redirects by /r/{code}, exposes rule metadata, supports expiration by time or usage limit, and rate-limits generation requests.

Open API docs · Liveness · Readiness

Tech Stack

  • Go
    Application language
  • Scalar / OpenAPI
    API docs and schema
  • PostgreSQL
    Primary data store
  • Redis
    Distributed rate limiting
  • Prometheus
    Metrics scraping
  • OpenTelemetry
    Tracing and telemetry
  • Docker
    Container packaging
